master.name: Senior Software Engineer (Generalist Portfolio)
master.summary: Multi-disciplinary Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience across **Embedded Systems**, **Distributed Platforms**, and **Automated Quality Infrastructure**. Specialized in architecting high-fidelity validation frameworks and unified engineering portals that systematically eliminate organizational bottlenecks. Proven track record of delivering scalable solutions from low-level BSP optimization to AI-driven diagnostic platforms.

embedded.name: Embedded Systems & Firmware Specialist
embedded.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in **Embedded Systems**, **BSP Integration**, and **Hardware Validation Architecture**. Expert in navigating low-level hardware-software interfaces, developing UEFI/BIOS diagnostic suites, and optimizing build infrastructure for massive production scales. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams to resolve critical hardware blocks and defining department-wide development conventions.
featured_projects: OpenClaw: Log Matrix & Semantic Diagnostic Platform

fullstack.name: Full-Stack & Distributed Systems Architect
fullstack.summary: Full Stack Developer and Architect specialized in **Distributed Systems**, **Offline-First Synchronization**, and **Scalable Platform Engineering**. Expertise in designing high-concurrency architectures with rigorous consistency models and idempotent automation pipelines. Skilled in transforming fragmented legacy tools into unified, API-driven portals that systematically resolve organizational bottlenecks and accelerate CI/CD workflows.
featured_projects: OpenClaw AI Merge Request Review Service

tailored.name: Software Engineer III (Performance Infrastructure)
tailored.summary: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience specialized in **Performance Infrastructure**, **Test Automation Architecture**, and **Distributed Systems**. Expert in designing high-fidelity measurement tools and automated regression testing pipelines that accelerate **New Product Introduction (NPI)** cycles. Proven ability to architect comprehensive **dashboards** for real-time visibility into system health, systematically isolating components and triaging complex failures in large-scale environments.
featured_projects: OpenClaw: Log Matrix & Semantic Diagnostic Platform
